contract.aiCredits: Free, paid pack, Family Bank, Day Pass, and Premium AI access resolve through one shared decision.
contract.dayPass: Day Pass AI questions and report PDFs are consumed after successful provider/PDF generation.
contract.lifeAtlas: Signature is optional enrichment and missing signature never blocks Life Atlas.
contract.reports: All report lanes use the same free/premium/personal-credit/family-credit/day-pass/premium-subscription decision.
contract.signature: Signature reports require confirmed signature traits before PDF generation.
contract.ui: Report page shows the required credit/access before generation.
